---
title: "College Football Data API"
date: 2026-02-15
categories: [tool, python, api, sports]
status: "Active Use"
link: "https://collegefootballdata.com"
description: "Free API for college football statistics, play-by-play data, and betting lines"
---

## What It Does

The College Football Data API provides comprehensive college football data including team stats, player stats, game results, recruiting data, and betting lines. All for free with a simple API key.

## Why I Bookmarked It

This is my go-to source for CFB analytics. The data quality is excellent, the Python client makes it easy to use, and it's completely free. I've used this for analyzing Oklahoma's SEC transition and betting line analysis.

## Hello World Example

```python
import cfbd

# Configure API
configuration = cfbd.Configuration()
configuration.api_key['Authorization'] = 'YOUR_API_KEY'
configuration.api_key_prefix['Authorization'] = 'Bearer'

# Get 2025 games
api_instance = cfbd.GamesApi(cfbd.ApiClient(configuration))
games = api_instance.get_games(year=2025, team='Oklahoma')

print(f"Found {len(games)} Oklahoma games in 2025")
```

## Verdict

**Status: Active Use** - This is my primary data source for CFB analysis.

- **Pros:** Free, comprehensive data, great Python client, excellent documentation
- **Cons:** Rate limits exist (but generous), some advanced metrics require premium
- **Use Cases:** Game analysis, trend tracking, betting research

## Resources

- [Official API Docs](https://collegefootballdata.com/api/docs)
- [Python Client](https://github.com/CFBD/cfbd-python)
- [My Analysis Using This API](../sports/oklahoma-football-evolution.html)
